title: Add DeathEvent Handler — Cancel Goal, Clear Queue, Mark Inventory Stale
description:
CRITICAL finding from Plan Recovery Specialist. ProcessEventsAsync in AgentBackgroundService.cs has NO `case DeathEvent:` handler. Death falls to `default:` which is LogDebug only. After death/respawn: goal is NOT cancelled, queue is NOT cleared, no emergency stop, inventory stays stale (pre-death counts). GenericGatherGoal.IsComplete can return true prematurely because stale inventory shows 10/10 when bot actually has 0.

Fix: Add `case DeathEvent:` handler that calls CancelGoal(), clears correlated actions, marks inventory stale, and sets goal to null.

Source: Sprint 51 Council, Plan Recovery Specialist, Finding F-DEATH
